market_context: Risk-off tape: 'Nasdaq Tumbles 1.5% Amid Selloff In Chip Stocks: Investor Sentiment Weakens, Greed Index Moves To Fear Zone' (07-17) after Korea/SK Hynix memory chaos knocked semis despite TSMC's record Q2. VOO 690.19, just off its 30d high. Data pull PARTIAL for the 9th consecutive run: fundamentals failed for all 7 tickers (proxy 403), prices+news intact — sector caps remain unenforceable, so any buy would be rejected sector-unknown. Every ticker's headline list was non-empty today. Portfolio is 100% cash; the holdings-only breaking-news web sweep was not applicable. Earnings so far are good (JNJ beat-and-raise 07-15, UNH upbeat Q2 07-16, TSMC record 07-16) yet semis sold off anyway — beats being sold is a caution flag, not an entry signal. All holds on a one-source (Benzinga snapshot) day.

signals.thesis: 'Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters' (FT via 07-17 snapshot) plus 'Apple's AI Catch-Up Plan May Include Buying Chip Companies' (07-16) show AI strategy in flux while price sits at 332.85, the top of its 30d range (275-333). Chasing a 52-week high on a one-source day with no fundamentals fails the entry bar. Falsify toward buy on a second independent source confirming China AI momentum; toward sell if the OpenAI legal fight escalates into talent/product delays.
sources: benzinga/FT: 'Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters' (2026-07-17)
benzinga: Apple's AI Catch-Up Plan May Include Buying Chip Companies (2026-07-16)

signals.thesis: 'Alphabet Stock Sinks on Reports of Google Gemini Delays' + Bloomberg's 'Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals' (both 07-16) are the first concrete product-execution cracks; price fell 370.98->354.31, mid 30d range. Waymo regulatory noise (SF mayor, 07-17) is minor. Not a sell: cloud momentum intact (Intel/Gemini Enterprise, 07-17). Falsify toward sell if the delay slips a quarter or ad/cloud prints soften; toward buy if launch lands on a revised near-term date.
sources: benzinga/Bloomberg: 'Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals' (2026-07-16)
benzinga: Alphabet Stock Sinks on Reports of Google Gemini Delays (2026-07-16)

signals.thesis: Post-earnings tape improved: 'Johnson & Johnson Posts Upbeat Q2: IM Momentum Building Into 2027' (07-16) and the DePuy Synthes spinal-implant tuck-in (07-16) support the beat-and-raise, and price stabilized 246.98->249.54 after the sell-the-news dip. But the wall of PT raises is chatter, ignored per policy, and a buy would be rejected sector-unknown (no fundamentals, 9th run). Falsify toward buy on price holding >250 with a non-Benzinga source; toward sell below 240.
sources: benzinga: Johnson & Johnson Posts Upbeat Q2: IM Momentum Building Into 2027 (2026-07-16)
benzinga: J&J unit DePuy Synthes acquires Expanding Innovations (2026-07-16)

signals.thesis: 'Microsoft Wants Sales Team to Push Its Own AI Models Instead of Rivals OpenAI, Google and Anthropic' (07-16) signals a first-party pivot with uncertain Azure revenue mix effects; The Information's AI bug-finder item (07-17) is early-stage. Price 393.92, mid 30d range (352-428), whipsawing with the chip tape. No hard Azure datapoint either way. Falsify toward buy on a concrete Azure growth print; toward sell if the first-party pivot visibly strains the OpenAI partnership.
sources: benzinga: Microsoft Wants Sales Team to Push Its Own AI Models Instead of Rivals (2026-07-16)
benzinga/The Information: 'Microsoft Preps Mythos-Like AI Bug Finder' (2026-07-17)

signals.thesis: Demand signals stay firm — 'Nvidia's Jensen Huang Announces AI Factory' in Tokyo (07-17), QumulusAI joining the cloud-partner network (07-17) — but the sector is selling good news: 'Korea Drives Semi Stocks Lower Despite Solid Taiwan Semi Earnings' (07-16). Price 207.12, mid 30d range. Buying a semi into a fear-zone tape on one source fails the bar. Falsify toward buy if semis stabilize and a second source confirms demand; toward sell on named hyperscaler defections to AMD.
sources: benzinga: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Announces AI Factory... in Tokyo (2026-07-17)
benzinga: Korea Drives Semi Stocks Lower Despite Solid Taiwan Semi Earnings (2026-07-16)

signals.thesis: Q2 landed well: 'Gold Falls Over 1%; UnitedHealth Posts Upbeat Earnings' and 'UnitedHealth Hits 15-Month High' (both 07-16), with MA losses flagged but absorbed ('Rally Sparks Bullish Case for Healthcare ETFs Despite Medicare Advantage Losses', 07-16). Price 423.28 after a +15mo-high spike — post-print chase risk, one-source day, and a buy would be rejected sector-unknown anyway. Falsify toward buy on a second source confirming MLR trend; toward sell if MA loss guidance worsens.
sources: benzinga: Gold Falls Over 1%; UnitedHealth Posts Upbeat Earnings (2026-07-16)
